headline: Substation Automation Market Size, Industry Dynamics, Opportunity Analysis and Forecast 2026-2035
summary: The substation automation market is driven by rising electricity demand and modernization needs due to urbanization and industrial growth. Opportunities abound in automation technologies, vPAC systems, and integrating distributed resources. Major barriers include cybersecurity risks. Key players include Hitachi Energy, Siemens Energy, and GE Vernova.
